body_excerpt: In private_handle_t of mali_gralloc_buffer.h, there is a possible information disclosure due to uninitialized data. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In private_handle_t of mali_gralloc_buffer.h, there is a possible information disclosure due to uninitialized data. This could lead to local information disclosure with no additional execution privile
